title: CatalystMC
description: CatalystMC revolutionizes your SMP with 14 craftable classes, each featuring custom active abilities, passives, and devastating Dynasty Ultimates. Master unique playstyles; from the time-bending Chrono to the tanky Titan; and dominate the battlefield with
body:
# CatalystMC: Forge Your Destiny
**CatalystMC is a comprehensive server-side plugin designed for Paper 1.21+ servers. It introduces a high-stakes economy and combat system based on Catalysts—powerful artifacts that grant players unique abilities.**

The core mechanic of this plugin is Scarcity. Unlike standard RPG plugins where everyone can max out their stats, CatalystMC enforces a strict "History" system: Specific Legendary Catalysts can only be crafted once per map. Once a player forges a Dynasty Catalyst, it is locked forever, making that item a unique artifact of immense value and power.

### 🌟 Key Features
The Catalyst System
Catalysts are physical items (Tokens) held in your inventory that grant passive and active abilities. They are obtained through expensive, custom crafting recipes.

### The "History" Mechanic (Server-Wide Limits)
This plugin features a persistent storage system that tracks the crafting history of the server.

**Unique Artifacts:** If a player crafts a Dynasty Tier catalyst (e.g., The Dragon), the server records this event.

**The Lock:** No other player can ever craft that specific catalyst again.

**The Economy:** This forces players to trade, fight for, or steal existing Catalysts rather than grinding for their own, driving player interaction and conflict.

### ⚔️ The Catalysts
Currently, the plugin supports a wide variety of playstyles, split into three tiers of rarity:

**Tier 1: The Standards**
Berserker: For aggressive close-quarters combat.

Phantom: For mobility and escape artists.

Frostborn: Slow your enemies and control the battlefield.

**Tier 2: The Advanced**
Static: Harness the power of lightning and speed.

Vampire: Life-steal mechanics for sustainability.

Titan: Tank-like durability for frontline defense.

Shadow: Stealth and darkness manipulation.

Pyro: Fire immunity and offensive burn damage.

Bedrocker: heavily defensive, terrain-based playstyle.

Chrono: Time manipulation and position rewinding.

**Tier 3: The Dynasties (Unique Artifacts)**
These items have the "One Per Server" restriction.

🐉 Dragon: The ultimate offensive power.

⚔️ Warlord: Commander of the battlefield.

🪽 Valkyrie: Mastery of flight and air combat.

💀 Revenant: Defies death and controls soul magic.

**🛠️ Technical Requirements & Installation**
Please ensure your server meets the following requirements before installing.

**Server Software: Paper 1.21.10 (or higher).**

**Java Version: Java 21.**

**As of December 2025, no dependencies needed.**

**How to Install:**
Download the CatalystMC.jar.

Place it in your server's /plugins folder.

Ensure you have the dependencies listed above installed.

Restart your server.

Optional: Check config.yml to view the server crafting history or reset limits.

📜 Commands & Permissions
/catalyst - Main command to view info.

/catalyst give <player> <type> - Admin command to force-give a token (bypasses crafting limits).

⚖️ Disclaimer & Compliance
Server-Side Only: This is a server plugin, not a client-side mod. It does not require players to install anything on their client.

Fair Play: This plugin complies with Mojang's EULA and Modrinth's rules on cheating. It does not provide unfair client-side advantages (like X-Ray) and is designed for consensual SMP environments.

Data Usage: This plugin stores basic crafting data in a local flat-file (config.yml) to maintain the limit system. It does not transmit data to external servers.

**Developed by jiahfrr.**
